title: The Shadow of Thornwood Castle
description: Purpose-built test text for systematic soundscape evaluation. 2 chapters, ~690 words, ~5 min TTS. 4+3 environments, ~21 SFX events, 3 weather states, intensity arc.

expectedSceneSegments.description: Dense forest with birdsong, morning sun, walking on leaves. Stream is a salient entity within this environment (long-duration SFX, not separate scene).
Open meadowland, wind in grass, sheep bleating, approaching storm
Heavy rain, thunder, lightning, intense storm
At the castle door, pounding on door, door opening

expectedSfxEvents.query: twig snap branch breaking
woodpecker hammering pecking tree
rushing stream water flowing over rocks creek
frog croak splash water plop
sheep bleating distant farm
thunder rumble distant low growl
rain drops hitting stone ground
lightning crack thunder explosion close
fist pounding heavy wooden door knocking
iron bolt metal sliding scraping lock
heavy wooden door opening creaking groaning hinges

expectedSceneSegments.description: Vast stone entrance hall, echoing footsteps, fire crackling
Dark corridor with suits of armor, approaching footsteps, candle light
Small chamber at top of spiral staircase, storm outside, rattling window

expectedSfxEvents.query: heavy door slamming shut boom echo
clock chime bell tower striking
fire crackling hearth wood popping sparks
footsteps stone floor walking deliberate measured
rat scurrying claws clicking stone floor
wooden stairs creaking groaning weight
wooden door creaking rusty hinges opening
window rattling wind storm glass
match striking hiss flame lighting
iron key turning lock clicking grinding metal
water dripping echoing stone walls cave

description.ambientOccurrence: How many ambient environments were resolved (with assets) vs expected count?
description.sfxOccurrence: How many SFX events were resolved (with assets) vs expected count?
description.ambientSimilarity: Average cosine similarity of resolved ambient assets (from pipeline resolution)
description.sfxSimilarity: Average cosine similarity of resolved SFX assets (from pipeline resolution)
description.ambientCoverage: Purely temporal: what fraction of chapter voice duration is covered by ambient audio?
description.ambientVolume: Is ambient LUFS in target range relative to voice? (EBU R128)
description.sfxAudibility: Are SFX events perceptibly louder than ambient bed? (LUFS contrast)
